name: Sylvia La Torre
description:
Sylvia La Torre was born on June 4, 1933, to director Olive La Torre and actress Leonora Reyes. She was widely recognized by her nickname, ''Ibyang''.

She attended the [[University of Santo Tomas]] [[University of Santo Tomas Conservatory of Music|Conservatory of Music]] under a scholarship where she earned a degree in Voice and Music.
